falsification_thresholds_vs_precision.interpretation: At sigma_dt=0.5d, a residual |R_obs|<1.0d excludes 10.3% of the prior prediction envelope.
At sigma_dt=1.0d, a residual |R_obs|<2.0d excludes 20.5% of the prior prediction envelope.
At sigma_dt=1.5d, a residual |R_obs|<3.0d excludes 30.3% of the prior prediction envelope.
At sigma_dt=2.0d, a residual |R_obs|<4.0d excludes 39.7% of the prior prediction envelope.
At sigma_dt=3.0d, a residual |R_obs|<6.0d excludes 56.3% of the prior prediction envelope.
At sigma_dt=5.0d, a residual |R_obs|<10.0d excludes 79.3% of the prior prediction envelope.

prospective_falsification_condition.statement: If an independent blind-prediction residual for the longest-baseline loop in SN 2025wny is consistent with zero at the 2-sigma level (|R_obs| < 4.0 d) and the delay precision satisfies sigma_dt < 2.0 d, the linear log-magnification ansatz is excluded at 95% confidence for that system geometry.

headline: SN 2025wny predicted proxy-model residual: 5.2 [1.5, 11.3] days (16th-84th percentile). Required precision for 3-sigma test: sigma_dt < 1.7 days. Falsification threshold (sigma_dt=2.0d): |R_obs| < 4.0d.
